summary: Admin customers page successfully renders the success state with customer table, search controls, and quick actions. The interface shows proper data structure and functionality but uses generic UI styling instead of the required diner brand palette for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: The admin interface uses a generic dark theme with neutral grays and standard UI colors instead of sharing the coherent brand palette required for authenticated surfaces. This creates brand discontinuity between public and logged-in experiences.

actions: Apply consistent brand palette across authenticated admin surfaces to match public marketing treatment
Replace generic dark theme colors with the established diner color system
